CustomObject.description: Generic integration provider config. One CMT row per external system. The framework's GenericHttpProvider reads everything from here at dispatch time — endpoint, body template, header map, response rules, optional signer extension. Subscribers add their own provider rows post-install. No per-system Apex required for the common case; edge cases plug in via IIntegrationTemplateExtension implementations referenced by name.
CustomObject.label: Integration Provider
